## Checklist

- [ ] This fits the design principles in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I added or updated regression tests for behavior changes where feasible.
- [ ] I updated docs/config examples when behavior or setup changed.
- [ ] I did not add analytics, ads, tracking SDKs, or third-party data collection.
- [ ] I did not touch the crypto layer, or I requested security-focused review.
